patch.summary: Move a task to a different parent
Update the status of the specified task

post.summary: Create a sub-task under a parent task

get.summary: Display a listing of tasks for a workspace
Display a listing of root workspaces (parent_id is null)
Display a listing of trashed workspaces
Display a listing of archived workspaces

patch.summary: Move the specified workspace to a new parent
Toggle archive status of a workspace

get.summary: Get breadcrumbs (ancestor path) for a specific workspace
Display a listing of the workspaces or search results

post.summary: Store a newly created workspace in storage

put.summary: Update the specified workspace in storage

delete.summary: Remove the specified workspace from storage

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
